title: Bad associative array default needs a verilator error instead of a c++ compile error

features.name: associative array of unpacked array with '1 default value
features.description: Code should include an associative array with an unpacked array value type that uses a 'default:'1' assignment
features.snippet:
typedef byte unsigned word_t[4];
word_t words[longint unsigned] = '{default:'1};
